sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20158" key="blixanw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βλῑχ-ᾰνώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, of fish, <sense id="n20158.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">clammy</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0447.tlg001:17:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17.15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
